title: memcpy Thunk
one_line_summary: Indirect call to system memcpy via imported function pointer

title: FailOnThreadIDGen
one_line_summary: Logs a fatal error for thread ID generation failure and triggers a breakpoint.

title: Debug Breakpoint Wrapper
one_line_summary: Calls a setup function then triggers a debug break (BRK #1)

title: Debug Breakpoint Handler
one_line_summary: Triggers a software breakpoint using BRK #0xF003 instruction

title: Zero-Return Function
one_line_summary: Returns zero (W0 = 0) and exits.

title: Capacity Overflow Trigger
one_line_summary: Triggers a debug breakpoint after printing 'capacity overflow' error.

title: _initialize_onexit_table stub
one_line_summary: Indirect branch to the imported _initialize_onexit_table function via PLT

title: Indirect Call to memset
one_line_summary: Loads and branches to the imported memset function via PLT stub

title: Indirect memcmp Call
one_line_summary: Performs an indirect call to the imported memcmp function via an import table pointer.

title: Debug Breakpoint Stub
one_line_summary: Sets up a stack frame, calls a setup function, then triggers a software breakpoint (BRK #1) for debugging.

title: Check Global Zero Flag
one_line_summary: Loads a global dword, checks if non-zero, and returns 1 if set or 0 if zero.

title: Jump to sub_140002C1C
one_line_summary: Unconditional jump to function at 0x140002C1C

title: Destroy Thread-Local Storage (Eager Mode)
one_line_summary: Checks and atomically clears TLS flag, then calls cleanup routine if active.

title: Absolute Value Computation (Integer)
one_line_summary: Computes the absolute value of a 32-bit signed integer in W0, using conditional negation based on sign bit.

title: Heap Allocation Wrapper
one_line_summary: Calls GetProcessHeap() and branches on NULL return, preserving X19/X20 and X29/X30

title: Function Swapper
one_line_summary: Swaps X0 and X1 using X8 as temporary, then branches to sub_140011FA4

title: __alloca_probe Stack Growth Validator
one_line_summary: Checks if stack allocation of (X15 << 4) bytes would exceed the stack limit (X17), branching if safe

title: Trampoline to sub_140015A20
one_line_summary: Direct jump (unconditional branch) to function at 0x140015A20

title: Copy String with Length 0x18
one_line_summary: Copies 0x18 bytes from address in X1 to X0 by calling sub_140011FA4

title: Tail Call Through Function Pointer
one_line_summary: Loads a function pointer from offset 0x20 of X8 (itself loaded from [X0+8]), then jumps to it.

title: Null-pointer sanitizer trap
one_line_summary: Checks if the first qword of the struct pointed to by X0 is zero; if not, it calls a redacted debug handler and triggers a breakpoint.

title: Virtual Method Dispatch via Vtable
one_line_summary: Dispatches to a method pointer retrieved from a vtable using the byte at [X0] as an index, then branches to the method address.

title: Conditional Jump via Bit Test
one_line_summary: Tests bit 0x1A of W8 and jumps to loc_140005ACC if set; otherwise branches to sub_140013BCC

title: Returns One
one_line_summary: Loads immediate value 1 into W0 and returns

title: Argument Swapper and Redirector
one_line_summary: Swaps the first two arguments (X0, X1) using registers X8 and X9, then branches to sub_140012B6C with modified arguments.

title: Null or -1 Check on Field Offset 0x18
one_line_summary: Returns early if the 64-bit value at offset 0x18 of the struct pointed to by X0 is either 0 or -1.

title: Initialize Field to 1
one_line_summary: Loads a value from [X0] into W0, sets W1 to 1, and branches to sub_1400135B8 (likely a setter or initialization routine for a struct field).

title: Function sub_1400127C4
one_line_summary: Reorders function arguments by loading X8/X1 from stack, then X2/X3 from memory, and jumps to sub_1400124BC with adjusted arguments.

title: Unimplemented Function Stub
one_line_summary: Logs a 'not implemented' message and triggers a breakpoint exception.

title: Conditional Branch with Bit Test
one_line_summary: Tests bit 0 of W2; if set, shifts right and branches to sub_1400130C8; otherwise loads address and branches to sub_1400124BC.

title: SetLastError(0x78) with E_FAIL(0x80004001)
one_line_summary: Sets last error to 0x78 ('x'), then returns with E_FAIL (0x80004001) likely to propagate failure.

title: Subroutine Entry with Guard Check
one_line_summary: Checks a global flag (bit 0 of dword_14001D070) to decide whether to continue execution or return via a tail call to itself (likely part of a PLT or lazy binding stub).

title: Gamma Transform Initialization
one_line_summary: Initializes gamma transformation by calling internal helper functions and setting new memory mode.

title: Debug Breakpoint Trigger
one_line_summary: Calls a formatting or logging function with '+' separator, then triggers a software breakpoint (BRK #1) for debugging.

title: Early-Exit Guard Function
one_line_summary: Returns early if W10 is zero or W0 is -1, otherwise checks a global dword for zero and returns if true, after a memory barrier.

title: Breakpoint Stub Function
one_line_summary: Calls sub_140016DAC with a modified argument (X1 << 1 | 1) and triggers a software breakpoint (BRK #1).

title: Breakpoint Trampoline
one_line_summary: Sets up stack frame, calls a helper function, then triggers a debug breakpoint (BRK #1)

title: Unlock Startup & Cleanup
one_line_summary: Releases a startup lock and conditionally cleans up a static object if the lock was held.

title: Function Pointer Dispatch via Offset 0x18
one_line_summary: Loads function pointer from [X8+0x18] and jumps to it, after simultaneously loading X0 and X8 from [X0+8]

title: Crash-on-Null-Input Wrapper
one_line_summary: Calls one of two internal subroutines based on whether X1 is non-zero, then triggers a debug break (BRK #1) regardless — acting as a guarded crash point or assertion.

title: Pointer Dereference and Branch
one_line_summary: Dereferences X0, sets W1 to 1, then branches to sub_1400135B8

title: Guard Check Icall NOP
one_line_summary: No-op stub for indirect call validation, simply returns.

title: Debug Stub with Context Setup
one_line_summary: Initializes local context, calls sub_140016DAC for processing, then triggers a BRK #1 breakpoint to hand control to a debugger.

title: Parameter Swappercalling sub_140011FA4
one_line_summary: Reorders input arguments (X0↔X2) and branches to sub_140011FA4

title: Check Pointer and Non-Zero Value
one_line_summary: Loads a pointer from [X0+0x10], checks if it's -1 or zero, and returns early if true; otherwise falls through and returns normally.

title: Indirect Call Through Method Table
one_line_summary: Loads an object pointer and a function pointer from the object, then branches to the function pointer, effectively calling a method via a vtable or similar dispatch mechanism.

title: SetThreadDescription Trampoline
one_line_summary: Dynamically resolves and caches SetThreadDescription from kernel32.dll, then jumps to it via a stub or directly, passing original arguments.

title: Inline Stack Symbol Resolver
one_line_summary: Dynamically loads DbgHelp APIs and walks inline call stack frames to resolve and print symbol information using conditional flag-driven API invocation.

title: Hex String Parser Wrapper
one_line_summary: Prepares arguments and calls a core hex-decoding routine, configuring parsing options via register setup (e.g., case sensitivity, length), then cleans up stack and returns.

title: Conditional Shift and Tail Call
one_line_summary: Checks bit 0 of W1; if set, shifts X1 right by 1, swaps X1/X2, and tails to sub_140005F00; otherwise jumps to sub_1400074D0

title: One-Time onexit Table Initialization
one_line_summary: Initializes CRT onexit cleanup tables once, validating input and setting a global init flag on success.

title: Assertion Failure Handler
one_line_summary: Calls sub_14001692C to validate input, and if validation fails (X1 == -1), triggers a breakpoint (BRK #1) after calling sub_140016BA4 (likely a debug/error handler).

title: Weighted Opcode Threshold Checker
one_line_summary: Uses W0 to index into a lookup table, walks cumulative byte-weight entries until exceeding a threshold derived from W0, and returns 1 if exceeded, else 0.

title: Debug Stub Wrapper
one_line_summary: Sets up a stack frame, initializes locals, calls sub_1400016F8, then triggers a breakpoint for debugging/hooking.

title: Guarded One-Time Initialization Acquire
one_line_summary: Atomically sets a global initialization flag via load-acquire/store-release exclusive loop, branching to slow-path initializer if already set, returning the flag address as in __cxa_guard_acquire semantics.

title: __onexit: Register Exit Handler
one_line_summary: Registers a function to be called at program exit, using a custom exit table if available, otherwise falling back to _crt_atexit.

title: Recursive-Descent Type Expression Parser
one_line_summary: Parses tokenized Rust-style type expressions using a recursive descent approach with recursion depth tracking and limit enforcement, mapping specific tokens to parsing branches that construct types or report errors.

title: CRT Initialization with TLS Retry Logic
one_line_summary: Initializes C runtime (single/multi-threaded), performs CRT and TLS setup, retries TLS initialization on failure, and exits with appropriate status code.

title: Release Fast Mutex and Exit Critical Region
one_line_summary: Releases a fast mutex unsafely and exits a critical region by calling two internal helper functions.

title: Fast Byte Search with 16-Byte SIMD-ish Scan
one_line_summary: Finds the first occurrence of a byte in memory using 16-byte aligned chunk processing with bit-twiddling optimizations, falling back to byte-by-byte for small or unaligned buffers.

title: Allocate-and-Degrade-Memory-Protection
one_line_summary: Allocates RWX memory, then downgrades it to RW via NtProtectVirtualMemory, likely for reflective code loading with debug-level error reporting.

title: E-Scanner Parser State Advancer
one_line_summary: Scans an input buffer for ASCII 'E', updates position/end pointers, and handles buffer refill via callbacks on missing 'E'.

title: Safe Buffer Copy with Heap Allocation
one_line_summary: Allocates a new buffer of size (input_len + offset), conditionally copies data with bounds checking, and frees the original buffer.

title: CRT Cleanup Routine
one_line_summary: Performs conditional C runtime uninitialization—skipping if flag is zero, invoking destructor helper twice for full cleanup (or branch to thread-exit path), and returning 1 on success.

title: s_Prefixed Base64 Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes base64-like data with 's_' prefix, using a custom alphabet (A-Za-z0-9_), into an output buffer while validating and handling partial bytes.

title: Stack Structure Initialization with Breakpoint Hook
one_line_summary: Copies two 8-byte values from the first argument’s offsets 0x8 and 0x18 into a local stack structure, passes it to sub_140001600, and hits a BRK #1 debug breakpoint.

title: Exception/Debug Trampoline Stub
one_line_summary: Prepares exception context (arguments + stack info) and invokes a debug/exception handler (sub_140016DAC), then triggers a breakpoint (BRK #1) to halt execution.

title: Hex Encoder Wrapper
one_line_summary: Converts binary data to uppercase hexadecimal ASCII string, branching on input flags to delegate to helper functions for formatting or length handling.

title: Ring Buffer Ingest Routine
one_line_summary: Processes up to 16×X2 bytes from X1 into a ring buffer (X0), flushing/rotating as needed when space is insufficient.

title: Recursive JSON Serializer Walker
one_line_summary: Walks a structured object graph via recursive handler dispatch, applies formatting with conditionally selected string templates, and returns a status code.

title: Conditional Double-Parser Validator with Vtable Guard
one_line_summary: Calls a parser twice, checks resulting flags, conditionally invokes a vtable handler (e.g., close/nested op), and returns success iff either call succeeded and final guard condition holds.

title: Bounds-Checked Allocation Wrapper
one_line_summary: Validates size parameters, computes scaled/aligned buffer size with overflow checks, allocates via sub_14001699C, and asserts/traps on invalid input or allocation failure.

title: TLS Initialization Guard with State-Driven Behavior
one_line_summary: Performs one-time TLS initialization or cleanup based on a state byte in TLS metadata, returning 1 on successful init or 0 on early exit/cleanup.

title: ARM Debug Breakpoint Stub
one_line_summary: Prepares debug context, calls logging/debug setup functions, then triggers BRK #0xF003 to halt execution for debugger attachment.

title: Bounds-Checked Dynamic Buffer Append
one_line_summary: Appends up to (X2>>1) bytes from X1 to a managed buffer at X0, resizing if needed, and aborts on odd X2 values.

title: Ntdll Stub Integrity Checker & Hook Installer
one_line_summary: Verifies x64 ntdll stub integrity by checking for the canonical prologue, triggers a debug break on hook detection, and installs a custom redirector/callback if validation passes.

title: UTF-8 Substring Validator & Decoder
one_line_summary: Validates ASCII letters and UTF-8 sequences in a specified substring range, decodes valid codepoints, and dispatches to handler callbacks— aborting via BRK on validation failure.

title: Unicode Escape Parser
one_line_summary: Recursively parses punycode-encoded input expecting a 'U-K-C' pattern (e.g., \uXXXX), validating syntax, advancing index, and reporting errors via callback.

title: Punycode Label Decoder with Recursion Control
one_line_summary: Decodes and validates a punycode-encoded IDN label starting at X0, using recursion depth tracking and returning success (0) or failure (1) in W0.

title: Fast 64-bit Unsigned Decimal Conversion
one_line_summary: Converts a 64-bit unsigned integer to a 20-digit decimal ASCII string using multiplicative division (UMULH with magic constants), stores digits on the stack, then calls a formatter/output function.

title: Versioned TLS Structure Validator with Conditional Setup
one_line_summary: Validates a magic constant (0xC00000FD), optionally retrieves and adjusts a TLS-based versioned structure (if version > 2), and unconditionally calls helper sub_140002A40 before returning success (0).

title: Variable-Length Integer Decoder with Formatting Integration
one_line_summary: Decodes compact variable-length encoded integers/structures from a byte stream, validates the result, and interfaces with a formatting or type-trait subsystem—asserting failures with BRK #1.

title: Buffer Sizing & Growth Prep Helper
one_line_summary: Computes a growth-safe buffer size as max(2*count, index+1), delegates allocation to a helper, and returns success or -1 while conditionally updating the input struct.

title: UTF-8 Encode and Copy with Bounds Check
one_line_summary: Encodes a Unicode code point from W1 into UTF-8 into a local buffer, copies it to a destination (updating internal pointer), performs conditional finalization, and returns 1 on buffer overflow (insufficient space).

title: NT Stack Unwind & Crash Dumper
one_line_summary: Implements Windows NT stack unwinding and exception handling logic using RTL APIs, with loop detection, logging, and synchronization for crash/diagnostic reporting.

title: TLS Guard Initialization
one_line_summary: Retrieves TLS value via X18, decrements by 0x10 if ≥2 (else passes zero), then invokes sub_140002714 for stack guard/cookie setup.

title: Path Separator Validator/Normalizer
one_line_summary: Validates and normalizes Windows path separators ('\' or '/') in a path string, computes required buffer size, and writes a structured descriptor to the output buffer, crashing if buffer space is insufficient.

title: Option Constructor Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Parses a leading byte tag (1 → Some, else → None) from data at [X0] and dispatches to appropriate Option variant constructor.

title: Byte Pattern Search with SIMD Fallback
one_line_summary: Searches a buffer for a target byte using optimized vectorized and fallback byte-scan logic; returns 1 if found, 0 otherwise, and crashes on invalid inputs via BRK #1.

title: CRT Startup Lock Acquisition
one_line_summary: Acquires a startup lock via atomic retry loop for thread-safe CRT initialization, returning 0 on success or 1 on failure.

title: SIMD-Accelerated Pattern Matcher with Bounds Checking
one_line_summary: Performs efficient string/substring matching (likely KMP/Boyer-Moore variant) on buffer data, using SIMD for ≥32-byte inputs, returning structured match results or triggering debug traps on errors/invalid inputs.

title: UTF-8 Prefix Matcher with SIMD Acceleration
one_line_summary: Performs SIMD-optimized longest-prefix matching against repeated bytes while validating trailing UTF-8 sequences, used for parsing protocol fields or structured data like URLs/headers.

title: Custom Instruction Decoder with Flag-Based Dispatch
one_line_summary: Parses a custom-encoded data blob by interpreting flag bits in each byte to determine instruction type and operand size, then dispatches to callbacks via BLR.

title: VTable Initialization Guard
one_line_summary: Conditionally initializes or validates a vtable-like structure based on LSB of W2, optionally invoking setup callbacks and memory operations before returning success.

title: Conditional Debugging Initialization
one_line_summary: Checks a lock/initialization flag at [X0+0x48]; if set, prepares a stack structure with X8, X9, and a redacted string pointer, then calls sub_140016244 to register or initialize a debugging/logging resource.

title: Unicode Codepoint Validator/Decoder
one_line_summary: Validates and decodes a 16-bit input codepoint as ASCII or multi-byte Unicode (e.g., UTF-8/16) via range checks and table-driven byte sequence matching, returning success/failure.

title: UTF-8 Hex Decoder to u32
one_line_summary: Decodes up to 16 bytes of UTF-8-encoded hex string into a u32, returning success/failure in W0 and the decoded value in X1; panics on invalid input.

title: Conditional JSON-like Parser/Validator
one_line_summary: Branches on a flags byte to invoke deserialization callbacks with context-dependent string markers, returning success (1) on error, failure, or successful completion.

title: Path List Normalizer
one_line_summary: Normalizes or appends a path segment to a Windows-style path list, handling \/ separators, semicolon-delimited paths, and panicking on overflow or invalid input.

title: Safe Buffer Append with Reallocation
one_line_summary: Appends X2 bytes from source buffer X1 to a dynamic buffer at X0, automatically reallocating if needed, then updates the buffer's used-length pointer.

title: Identifier/Type Token Parser
one_line_summary: Lexes and parses identifiers and primitive type tokens (e.g., i8, u32) from a buffer, validates characters, resolves types case-insensitively, and reports errors or dispatches accordingly.

title: Magic Signature Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Validates two 64-bit stack values against two endianness-paired magic constants after calling a vtable function once or twice, branching on match to return different results or an error.

title: Conditional Wait/Signal Handler
one_line_summary: Implements a futex-like wait/signal primitive using Windows WaitOnAddress/WakeByAddressSingle APIs on ARM64, with atomic operations and state management for synchronization.

title: LSB Parity Check with Breakpoint
one_line_summary: Crashes or triggers a debugger breakpoint if the LSB of the target byte is set (odd value), otherwise returns normally.

title: Struct Initialization with Early-Exit Check
one_line_summary: Loads a struct from [x0], passes its contents and stack pointer to sub_14001171C, and exits early if the second loaded value (x20) is zero.

title: Conditional Header Validator
one_line_summary: Performs two-stage validation of input data using dispatchable function pointers, returning success (1) on specific early conditions based on header byte comparisons.

title: Bounded Dynamic Buffer Copy with Reallocation
one_line_summary: Copies data in fixed-size chunks into a managed buffer, expanding the buffer if needed, while validating bounds and handling 16-byte aligned entries.

title: SafeHeapResizeWithOverflowCheck
one_line_summary: Performs bounds-checked heap reallocation with overflow validation, scaling the element count by 16, and updates a status struct on success/failure.

title: Base62-like String Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes a Base62-like encoded string (alphabet 0-9a-zA-Z_>) into a binary buffer with overflow protection and early-exit on invalid chars, writing a success flag upon completion.

title: Buffer Cleanup with Sentinel-Driven Iteration
one_line_summary: Iterates over 16-byte entries in a buffer (pointed to by X8, count X9), skipping zero entries, then calls error handler sub_140005768 with W0 = -0xC (e.g., STATUS_INVALID_BUFFER_SIZE) upon termination.

title: Debug Assertion Guard Stub
one_line_summary: Validates input fields, calls helper functions, and triggers a software breakpoint (BRK #1) if an unexpected condition (result == 1) is encountered.

title: TLS Initialization Guard
one_line_summary: Ensures TLS blocks are initialized exactly once per thread; duplicate or inconsistent initialization triggers a fatal runtime panic.

title: Conditional 128-bit State Initialization/Update
one_line_summary: Conditionally initializes or updates a 16-byte state at [X0] based on flags in *(X0+0x18), invoking helper functions for bit-0 or bit-1 FlagSet variants, or falling back to simple accumulation.

title: Size-Limited Formatter Adapter
one_line_summary: Wraps a formatter to enforce a maximum output size, using a tracking adapter to detect truncation or overflow, and returns status codes or triggers errors when the limit is exceeded.

title: Is64BitPEWithSecurityDirectory
one_line_summary: Verifies the current module is a 64-bit PE (PE32+) with a non-empty security directory (indicating a digital signature).

title: Safe Buffer Expansion with Append Semantics
one_line_summary: Ensures sufficient capacity for X2 bytes at the end of a managed buffer, reallocating if needed, and returns a pointer to the new append location in X0.

title: Conditional Callback Executor
one_line_summary: Checks bit 0 of a status byte, caches and returns the result, or invokes a callback via a function pointer if the bit is set.

title: Parse and Validate Identifier 'u<digits>[_<letter>]'
one_line_summary: Parses identifiers matching 'u' + digits + optional '_' + uppercase letter/underscore, computes numeric value, stores span in state struct, and crashes on invalid input.

title: Debug Logger with Assert-and-Break on Failure
one_line_summary: conditionally logs/debugs arguments via helper functions, and triggers a breakpoint (BRK #1) on error after storing debug context.

title: Structured Binary Parser / Decoder
one_line_summary: Parses/decodes a custom binary format by interpreting a header's bit flags to route logic through validation, recursive dispatch, and iterative sub-decoding via sub_14001266C and function pointers, returning a success/failure flag.

title: Recursive Hex Parser with Recursion Limit
one_line_summary: Parses a hex string from a struct buffer, updates position, handles overflow/recursion limits, and returns success/failure via W8.

title: Variable-Length UTF-8 Integer Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit unsigned integer into a 1–4 byte UTF-8-style varint sequence at a dynamically growing buffer, updating the buffer pointer post-encode.

title: Buffered Line-Oriented Input Reader
one_line_summary: Reads and buffers input line-by-line, handling newline detection, buffer growth, and error states—behaving like a stream fgets equivalent.

title: Dynamic Buffer Resizer with Callbacks
one_line_summary: Resizes a buffer if requested size exceeds current capacity, handling reallocation, data copying, alignment padding, and optional callback invocation; returns 1 if reallocation occurred, else 0.

title: Path Prefix Classifier
one_line_summary: Classifies a buffer as Windows local, UNC, or unrecognized path, normalizing slashes and detecting drive letters or UNC prefixes, returning a status code via X8.

title: Safe Buffer Append with Auto-Resize
one_line_summary: Copies len bytes from src into a resizable buffer struct, checking bounds and reallocating if needed.

title: ScanBufferForE
one_line_summary: Scans a buffer starting at a stored offset for the character 'E', returning the next index if found, or (0,0) after validation loops if not.

title: Conditional Method Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Dispatches method calls to sub_140012400 unless object refcount at [X0+0x10] is -1, triggering alternate dispatch via [X0+0x18] and possibly sub_1400124BC.

title: Argument Prep Helper for sub_140011760
one_line_summary: Sets up stack frame and call arguments (including hex string pointer and negative length) for sub_140011760, then restores frame and returns.

title: Debug Assertion Validator
one_line_summary: Validates memory and arithmetic constraints, triggering BRK #1 on failures to halt execution for debugging.

title: Windows UTF-8 Console Output Validator
one_line_summary: Validates UTF-8 input and writes to Windows console, panicking with BRK #1 on encoding errors or internal failures.

title: Conditional Hex-Context Initialization
one_line_summary: Checks a flag in X1, skips work if set, otherwise initializes/validates context and calls a hex-formatting routine with a known reference string.

title: PE Loader Structure Validator
one_line_summary: Validates a PE/COFF loader structure by checking magic number (0xE06D7363), version (4), and subsystem/version field (0x1994000 ±2 offset) with pointer-authenticated control flow.

title: Custom Base64URL Decoder with Recursion
one_line_summary: Decodes Base64URL-style strings (using `_` and `-`) into binary data, supporting nested parsing via recursion (max depth 0x1F4) and reporting errors via structured callbacks.

title: Exception Handling / Debug Trap Prologue
one_line_summary: Sets up stack frame, saves arguments, prepares for SEH/unwind helper, triggers debug break (BRK #1), and falls through to unwind helper.

title: AArch64 Atomic Compare-Exchange (64-bit)
one_line_summary: Implements lock-free atomic compare-exchange using LDAXR/STLXR with hardware feature detection and fallback recursion for non-lock-free cases.

title: Class Constructor Setup
one_line_summary: Initializes a 32-byte object layout (including vtable and data pointers) on the stack and invokes a constructor function at sub_1400124BC.

title: FmtSpec Validator & Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and validates format specifiers (e.g., 'R', 'R_A', 'R__X') for a fmt-style library, validating prefixes and uppercase indices, then computing/offsetting indices via context-dependent post-processing.

title: Safe Managed Buffer Copy
one_line_summary: Copies up to X2 bytes from X1 into a managed buffer (base=*(X0+8), limit=*(X0+0x18)), advancing the base pointer, and aborts if the copy exceeds the available range.

title: Validated WaitOnAddress Wrapper
one_line_summary: Validates arguments for WaitOnAddress (rejecting -1, checking overflow via magic multiplier), returns -1 on failure, else performs timed wait and maps ERROR_TIMEOUT (0x5B4) to return code 1, otherwise 0.

title: Adaptive Spin-Wait with WaitOnAddress Fallback
one_line_summary: Implements a hybrid wait primitive that spins with exponential backoff on a shared byte at X0, then falls back to WaitOnAddress-based blocking if spinning times out.

title: Safe Buffer Parser with Alignment-Aware Dispatch
one_line_summary: Validates buffer length, parses content with alignment-sensitive dispatch (including comment/opcode handling via indirect calls), and shifts remaining buffer data after consumption.

title: Function Pointer Dispatch Loop
one_line_summary: Iterates over a table of function pointers, performing CFG and PAC checks before calling each non-null pointer—typically used for module initialization, cleanup, or callback dispatch.

title: WakeByAddressSingle Wrapper
one_line_summary: Wakes a single thread waiting on a memory address by conditionally invoking WakeByAddressSingle via internal RTL helpers.

title: Windows Entry Point Wrapper
one_line_summary: Prepares and passes arguments to sub_14000176C, initializing a Windows-style context by saving frame/link registers, storing the main entry point address on the stack, and forwarding X0–X2/W4 as calling convention parameters.

title: Jump Table Dispatcher with Conditional Stack Setup
one_line_summary: Indexes into parallel code/data tables using the low byte of X0, conditionally constructs a two-pointer structure on the stack based on X5, and calls a target handler, ending in a debug BRK trap.

title: Conditional Buffer Append with Bounds Check
one_line_summary: Copies up to half the byte count from X1 into a dynamically tracked buffer region, updating its end pointer, but delegates to auxiliary handlers on overflow, zero copy, or odd-length requests.

title: UTF-8 to UTF-16 Console Writer
one_line_summary: Converts UTF-8 input to UTF-16 using MultiByteToWideChar, writes to console via WriteConsoleW with validation and debug-enabled error branching.

title: Guarded Virtual Dispatch Stub
one_line_summary: A CFI/CFG-aware vtable dispatch stub that validates the call target, triggers a debug breakpoint on failure, and tail-calls the resolved function with adjusted arguments.

title: Structured Data Unmarshal & Validate Routine
one_line_summary: Decomposes two input structures via SIMD/scalar reads, performs normalization/validation callbacks, conditionally finalizes outputs, and returns success/failure codes in a looped transformation pipeline.

title: Prefix Parser for K/L Tokens
one_line_summary: Parses input buffer for 'K_' or 'L_' prefixes, delegates to helper functions, and handles syntax/recursion errors in a structured parser context.

title: TLS/FLS Initialization & Cleanup Stub
one_line_summary: Initializes thread-local storage using Windows FLS via FlsAlloc/FlsSetValue/FlsFree, enforces singleton setup via atomic CAS on a global index variable, registers runtime cleanup with _atexit, and halts with BRK debug traps on initialization/teardown failures.

title: Punycode Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes a Punycode-encoded ASCII string into Unicode code points with overflow/error handling and UTF-16 output support.

title: TLS-Based Atomic Counter Decrement with Cleanup and Wait
one_line_summary: Atomically decrements a 64-bit TLS counter, invokes a callback on nonzero decrements, frees resources when zero, and optionally waits via a memory-barrier-protected lock primitive—crashing on invalid states.

title: Smart Hex Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes bytes to ASCII hex string with conditional fast paths based on bits 0x19/0x1A of input metadata, falling back to a generic hex dump routine (sub_140011760) that handles prefix ('0x') and digit mapping.

title: Tagged Pointer Dispatcher with Conditional Callbacks
one_line_summary: Validates a tagged pointer in a struct, invokes callbacks or copy routines conditionally based on tag bits, and returns success/failure.

title: Base62 Recursive Parser with Prefix Handling
one_line_summary: Parses base-62 numeric values (with IB_/IE/BE prefixes) from a string buffer, enforcing recursion depth limits and updating parsed result and index in the buffer.

title: Synchronous NtWriteFile with Pending I/O Handling
one_line_summary: Performs a synchronous NT write via NtWriteFile + WaitForSingleObject, handles STATUS_PENDING asynchronously, converts errors to Win32 codes, and triggers a fatal runtime error with BRK on failure.

title: G_ Token Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and validates a 'G_' identifier token from a buffer using cursor tracking, optionally recurses, and returns 1 on success or 0 on failure.

title: Conditional Event/Command Dispatch Handler
one_line_summary: Interprets input control structure flags and parameters to route execution to appropriate callback or subsystem operation, likely handling async I/O or protocol events (e.g., SSL/sockets), returning 1 on successful dispatch or 0 on early exit.

title: Hex-to-UTF8 Decoder with Continuation Validation
one_line_summary: Parses hex strings or partial UTF-8 byte sequences, validates UTF-8 continuation rules, writes decoded bytes to a temp buffer, updates input pointers, and returns status or panic on errors.

title: Skip-to-'E' Parser Utility
one_line_summary: Performs a case-sensitive forward scan for 'E' in a buffer, increments the scan offset on match, and conditionally returns 0 or validates via external callbacks based on state at X0+0x28.

title: Debug Crash Trap Stub
one_line_summary: Sets up stack-based crash context structure and triggers a breakpoint (BRK #1) via a helper function, likely for telemetry or minidump capture before halting execution.

title: Conditional JSON Serializer Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Dispatches JSON serialization logic with compact or pretty-printed formatting based on bit flags, using a vtable-based callback system to emit formatted strings and delegate field serialization.

title: Hex String Helper Wrapper
one_line_summary: Prepares arguments for sub_140011760, passing the literal hex string "0x0123456789ABCDEF" with fixed parameters (len=2, buffer offset) to assist in string/data formatting or validation.

title: InitContextWithHardcodedKey
one_line_summary: Initializes a context (e.g., logging/crypto) by invoking sub_140011760 with a hardcoded hex key/salt and configuration flags.

title: Conditional Initialization with Redacted Setup
one_line_summary: Checks flag at X0+0x48; if non-zero, initializes stack struct and calls sub_140016244 with redacted string.

title: Hex String Formatter Helper
one_line_summary: Prepares arguments to call sub_140011760 with a hex string literal and buffer pointer, using stack-relative addressing and standard prologue/epilogue conventions.

title: UTF-16 to UTF-8 Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes UTF-16 input (with surrogate support) into UTF-8, updating pointers and returning output byte count

title: TLS-Driven Runtime Entry/Exit Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Performs thread-local setup/cleanup with TLS dispatch, atomic bookkeeping, and guarded exception-like exits using breakpoints and redacted error handlers.

title: E-Scanner Loop with Callbacks
one_line_summary: Scans a buffer for ASCII 'E' while optionally invoking callbacks on each non-'E' byte, tracking iterations and updating the internal index on match.

title: Debug Symbol Section Validator/Parser
one_line_summary: Validates and parses aligned debug symbol sections (e.g., DWARF/unwind data) starting with '#' tags, resolves function pointers, allocates buffers, and triggers debug crashes on validation failures.

title: Recursive Numeric Token Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and evaluates a numeric token from a string with base-range validation, digit accumulation (likely base-62), recursion depth limiting (max 500), and syntax error reporting.

title: Conditional Safe Buffer Copy
one_line_summary: Performs a conditional memcpy based on half the count W1, using struct metadata for buffer bounds and invoking a helper for overflow cases.

title: Auto-Sizing GetCurrentDirectoryW Wrapper
one_line_summary: Retries GetCurrentDirectoryW with exponentially increasing buffer sizes on ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER (0x7A) until the full path fits, then returns the result.

title: PE32+ Image Validator with Size-Flag Check
one_line_summary: Verifies the input is a valid 64-bit PE (PE32+) image and checks if a specific data directory's Size field has bit 31 set.

title: Object State Validator / Debug Sentinel
one_line_summary: Validates object state via a function pointer at offset +0x18; crashes via BRK #1 in debug builds if the pointer is unexpectedly non-null (or null, depending on interpretation), otherwise falls back to standard handling.

title: Conditional Memory Alignment Helper
one_line_summary: Aligns or reserves memory of size X1 relative to X0 by delegating to sub_140007AE8 and applying mask-based adjustment for sizes >0x10.

title: Smart Pointer Decay/Unlock
one_line_summary: Decrement reference count, validate tagged pointer, invoke cleanup hooks, and return true if the managed resource remains valid.

title: Conditional Buffer Copy with Bounds Validation
one_line_summary: Updates a buffer descriptor in-place by copying up to X2 bytes from (X1 + base) to base, after validating bounds via sub_140016B04.

title: SEH Error Message Formatter
one_line_summary: Prepares and invokes FormatMessageW with system or module-specific error codes, then routes success/failure to logging or crash-reporting handlers, with unreachable debug-break paths in error conditions.

title: Big-Integer Halving with Borrow Propagation
one_line_summary: Recursively or iteratively halves a 128-bit big integer stored at [X0+8], adjusting high/low parts with borrow via CSINC based on parity of the low part, driven by a count in X2.

title: Tagged Pointer Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Dispatches control flow based on the 2-bit tag in *[X0], handling four variants: tailcall (0), unknown (1), structured processing (2), and error/extended handling (3).

title: Single-Quoted String Parser with Escape Support
one_line_summary: Parses a single-quoted C-style string literal, handling escape sequences like \" or \' and returning 1 on valid termination or 0 on error.

title: Parse Extension Length and Normalize Path Segment
one_line_summary: Analyzes a null-terminated string to compute file extension length/type or normalized path segment size, storing results in an output struct based on metadata flags and type byte; triggers error on invalid type or overflow.

title: Conditional Vtable Initialization with Flag Set on Success
one_line_summary: Calls vtable method #3 only if flag at [X0] is 0, then sets that flag to 1 only if input X1 == 0xA before delegating to vtable method #4.

title: UUID-like Identifier Validator
one_line_summary: Parses and validates UUID-like identifiers with UTF-8, magic header checks (e.g., 'NZ__'), and structured error handling, branching on format signatures and breaking on validation failures.

title: Optimized UTF-8 Validator
one_line_summary: Validates a byte slice as UTF-8 using SIMD-accelerated scanning for high-byte detection and fallback byte-level checks for correctness, returning success with string pointer/length or error details on failure.

title: UTF-8 Code Point Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit Unicode code point `W1` into a variable-length UTF-8 byte sequence at `[X0+8]`, updating the pointer at `[X0]` to point past the written data, with overflow handling via `sub_140016B04`.

title: Conditional Function Pointer Caller with Bit-Check
one_line_summary: Calls *(arg1+0x20)(arg0, arg2) if arg2 != -1 and returns (result & 1), otherwise returns (arg3 != 0).

title: UTF-8 to UTF-32 Decoder with Validation
one_line_summary: Decodes the next UTF-8 character into a 32-bit Unicode codepoint while enforcing strict validity checks (bounds, overlong sequences, surrogates) and error handling via debug breaks.

title: Strict UTF-8 Quoted String Validator
one_line_summary: Parses and validates UTF-8 quoted strings with escape sequence support, aborting on invalid input via BRK.

title: UTF-8 Parser & Validator
one_line_summary: Walks a byte range, decodes UTF-8 sequences (1–4 bytes), validates encoding rules (continuation bytes, overlong forms), and invokes state callbacks on success or error.

title: CRT Startup & Single-Init Entry Point
one_line_summary: Thread-safe C runtime initialization with one-time setup, user entry point invocation, and proper exit code propagation.

title: Directive Parsing Routine with Alignment & '#'-Token Handling
one_line_summary: Parses '#'-prefixed directives by validating pointer alignment, checking for '#' at computed offsets, invoking structured callbacks, and triggering debug traps on misaligned or invalid inputs.

title: UTF-16 to UTF-8 Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes UTF-16 input (at X1) into UTF-8 output (at X0), handling surrogate pairs, validating input, and writing structured results (pointer/length) to X13.

title: Write Character Escape Sequence
one_line_summary: Writes C-style or Unicode escape sequences (e.g., \n, \uXXXX) for a given character into a buffer, with special handling for common escapes and fallbacks to curly-braced or Unicode notation.

title: UTF-8-Safe i64 Parser
one_line_summary: Parses a UTF-8 &str as a signed 64-bit integer, validating UTF-8 first, then delegating to a core parsing routine, returning the value on success or -1/0xFFFFFF...FE on error.

title: Aligned Heap Allocator for Small Objects (0x18-byte)
one_line_summary: Allocates and initializes a small aligned block (e.g., 0x18 bytes) using custom heap logic, handles bit-flagged paths for setup, validates allocation via guard/check, and copies payload into the allocated memory.

title: Rust Crash Backtrace Symbol Initialization
one_line_summary: Thread-safe, lazy-initialized Windows debug symbol setup for crash backtraces, using dbghelp.dll with mutex serialization and graceful error handling.

title: HeapFree Wrapper with Conditional Pointer Resolution
one_line_summary: Frees a heap block using HeapFree after conditionally selecting the block address from either X19 or X19-8 based on X2 >= 0x11.

title: UTF-8 String Validator and Token Decoder
one_line_summary: Parses and validates UTF-8 strings, supports prefixed number bases (octal/dec/hex), decodes special tokens (e.g., LLVM IR keywords), enforces UTF-8 well-formedness, and reports errors via BRK.

title: Masked 4-byte Pattern Matcher
one_line_summary: Compares a masked 32-bit pattern (derived from bit position via leading-zero count of the mask) against buffer data, using optimized 4-byte comparisons for counts ≥4 and byte-by-byte fallback for smaller ones.

title: Thread-Safe Init/Fini with TLS & Spinlock
one_line_summary: Performs atomic, retry-enabled initialization/finalization of a reference-counted module/object using TLS, spinlocks, and debug traps on failure.

title: UTF-8 Codepoint Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a Unicode codepoint from W1 into UTF-8 bytes, updates buffer pointer/length, and returns success/failure status.

title: Byte-Value Guard Assertion
one_line_summary: Asserts that the byte at address X0 equals 1; proceeds only if true, otherwise logs and breaks in debug mode.

title: Lazy Import Resolver Stub
one_line_summary: Resolves a critical function pointer on first use via a resolver stub; panics with BRK #1 on resolution failure or unexpected paths.

title: Atomic Test-and-Set Lock Acquisition
one_line_summary: Atomically attempts to set a lock flag to 1; returns 0 on success (lock acquired), or the original non-zero value after invoking a slow-path handler if contention detected.

title: Safe Buffer Append with Reallocation
one_line_summary: Copies len bytes from src into a managed buffer, automatically reallocating if insufficient space remains.

title: TLS Counter Initialization with Atomic Retry
one_line_summary: Atomically increments a thread-local counter using LDXR/STXR, validates TLS state, calls a dispatcher hook, and invokes cleanup/setup functions—branching to a breakpoint on failure.

title: Robust Identifier Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and validates a numeric or alphanumeric identifier from a struct, enforcing strict character rules, bounds checks, and error handling (e.g., BRK on failure).

title: Rust-like Type Syntax Parser
one_line_summary: Recursive descent parser validating and consuming Rust-inspired type expressions (pointers, casts, primitives, dyn traits), returning 1 on full successful parse or 0 on syntax/recursion error.

title: Conditional Parity Count for 'A' and Above
one_line_summary: Counts bytes ≥ 'A' (0x41) in a buffer, using scalar iteration for small/large sizes and SIMD reduction for 8–32-byte inputs.

title: Rust Panic Handler
one_line_summary: Formats and reports Rust panics by parsing PanicInfo args, converting UTF-8 payloads to strings, and invoking the platform-specific panic termination routine.

title: EncodeU32VarintWithCleanup
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit uint into a 1–4 byte UTF-8-style varint into a buffer and optionally triggers cleanup via function pointers in a secondary struct.

title: Recursive Expression Parser with Recursion Limit
one_line_summary: Parses a small DSL expression grammar (e.g., N/O/R/E constructs) using recursive descent, enforcing a recursion depth limit of 500 and reporting errors on mismatch or overflow.

title: Debug Breakpoint Stub
one_line_summary: Sets up a stack frame, logs or prepares exception data, and triggers a BRK #1 breakpoint to halt execution for debugger intervention.

title: Token Normalization & Path-Canonicalization Lexer
one_line_summary: Parses and normalizes a lexical token structure (e.g., path/URI fragment), updating internal state, result codes, and status flags while handling separators, extensions, and error conditions—possibly as part of a recursive or iterative parsing pass.

title: Smart Lock Acquire with Exclusive/Shared Semantics
one_line_summary: Acquires a lock using atomic compare-and-exchange on a 32-bit state word, supporting exclusive (0x80000000) and shared (0x40000000) modes, with downgrade handling and targeted wakeups via WakeByAddress APIs.

title: UTF-8 Prefix Matcher for Redacted String
one_line_summary: Validates that a UTF-8 byte slice starts with the 3-byte redacted prefix "???", returning 1 on match (possibly advancing the slice), 0 otherwise—handling bounds, empty input, and error states.

title: Futex-Style Wait/Lock Primitive
one_line_summary: Implements a low-level thread synchronization mechanism using atomic CAS on a global counter, TLS context, and Windows WakeByAddressSingle to coordinate wait/wake semantics, likely supporting mutexes or condition variables.

title: UTF-8 Scalar Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a Unicode code point (W1) into UTF-8 bytes, writing them into a dynamic buffer at X0+8 with automatic reallocation if needed.

title: Conditional Vector Initializer/Validator
one_line_summary: Checks if count at [X0+0x18] is -1 (error/uninitialized), 0 (empty), or positive (valid), calls helper sub_14000438C unconditionally, and conditionally invokes sub_140001040 only for valid non-zero counts.

title: Formatting Trait Deserializer
one_line_summary: Deserializes and validates a formatting trait object from a binary format, checking tag bits (X8 & 3 == 1), invoking vtable methods (e.g., destructor, conversion), and returning the reconstructed object pointer or zero on failure.

title: Safe Buffer Copy with Bounds Checking
one_line_summary: Performs a length-checked, potentially overlapping memory copy from a source buffer to a destination, using a flag to choose between allocation-based handling or in-place safe copying with bounds validation.

title: Struct Initializer with SIMD Data and Error Handling
one_line_summary: Wraps sub_1400098F8 to initialize a struct via X19: on success, copies Q0–Q2 SIMD data; on error (return -1), sets sentinel value -2 at offset 0x20.

title: Thread Startup Lazy Initializer
one_line_summary: Initializes a thread once via atomic TLS-based lazy setup, installs vectored exception handling and stack guarantees, then dispatches to a main-like entrypoint

title: Thread-Aware Atomic Increment with Panic Handling
one_line_summary: Atomically increments a global counter using ARMv8 LDAXR/STXR, enforces thread context via runtime checks, and triggers hard panics on failures or conflicts.

title: Conditional VTable Trampoline with Debug Break
one_line_summary: Branches to sub_140001A90 based on LSB of a vtable/struct value, prepares stack args, then triggers BRK #1 breakpoint; two exit paths converge after the call.

title: Aligned Pointer Dispatch with Vtable Method and Cleanup
one_line_summary: Validates pointer alignment (low 2 bits zero), conditionally calls a vtable function, then unconditionally calls sub_140001040(X0-1, 0x18, 8).

title: Vectorized Newline-Line Parser
one_line_summary: Efficiently scans input buffer for newline-terminated lines using SIMD masking, invoking a callback for each line with its slice and metadata.

title: Unicode Escape Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a character as escape sequences or Unicode escapes (e.g., \n, \uXXXX) into a buffer, handling ASCII, low Unicode, and fallback JSON-style escapes.

title: Windows Conditional Wait Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Implements a multi-path conditional variable wait routine that interprets a lock/condvar state byte to route to OS wait primitives (e.g., WaitOnAddress), spurious wakeup handlers, or immediate wake, common in Rust sync abstractions.

title: Conditional Delimiter Printer
one_line_summary: Prints a closing delimiter ('}', ']', ')', etc.) during JSON-like serialization based on flag checks and object metadata.

title: Conditional State Initialization with Vtable-Lookup
one_line_summary: Performs a null-check on a vtable-derived state pointer, conditionally invoking an initialization function if present, then unconditionally proceeds to epilogue after a redundant -1 check.

title: Windows Path Normalizer
one_line_summary: Parses and normalizes a Windows-style path string by resolving ., .., and separators, stripping redundant components and validating structure via recursive segment scanning.

title: Stack Cookie Reseeding with Entropy Mixing
one_line_summary: Reseeds the stack canary using high-resolution timing and process/thread IDs to enhance ROP mitigation, verifying and updating __security_cookie with XOR-based entropy mixing.

title: Safe 64-bit Multiplication with Overflow and Bounds Checking
one_line_summary: Performs checked 64-bit unsigned multiplication (UMULH + product + bounds check), routes to success/error handlers via optional callback or direct call, and writes result/status to output buffer—designed for secure runtime environments with CFG support.

title: Triadic Bounds Validator
one_line_summary: Validates ordering constraints among three input values (X0, X1, X2) and triggers a debug breakpoint via sub_140016DAC with context-specific arguments.

title: Formatting Trait Validator
one_line_summary: Validates formatting trait metadata for a type, checking pointer tags, dereferencing metadata fields, invoking validation hooks, and triggering a debug breakpoint on invariant failure.

title: Iterate and Call Null-Terminated Function Pointer Array
one_line_summary: Calls each function pointer in a null-terminated array from .data, with CFG validation and PAC-prologue/epilogue.

title: UTF-8 String Validation & Processing Routine
one_line_summary: Validates or processes a UTF-8 string slice using internal flags and reference counting, potentially retrying on failure and branching based on encoding or alignment checks.

title: Recursive Rust-Type Parser
one_line_summary: AArch64 recursive descent parser for Rust-style type syntax, using state-driven parsing with recursion limiting, keyword dispatch, and helper sub-parsers for constructs like pointers, references, dyn traits, impl, and arrays.

title: Robust Once-Flag Initialization with Futex-Style Waits
one_line_summary: Implements a thread-safe once-flag using atomic operations and Windows WaitOnAddress/WakeByAddressAll for efficient blocking and signaling, supporting unset/in-progress/completed/poison states.

title: Atomic Thread-Local Buffer Append/Resize
one_line_summary: Thread-safe dynamic buffer append or resize using TLS, atomic load/store-exclusive ops, and conditional growth via lock-free protocols.

title: Windows ARM64 CRT Initialization Stub
one_line_summary: Sets up runtime state, configures locale/file modes/atexit, and dispatches to the main entry point via SEH-safe initialization.

title: Trait Validation and Cleanup Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Validates a type pointer against a trait table, invokes a method from the table, performs cleanup of associated resources, and returns 0 on success—terminating with a debug break on invalid trait data.

title: Tag-Dispatched Cleanup/Deallocation
one_line_summary: Performs type-tag dispatch on obj->field_8 (tags 2/3), calls vtable cleanup functions, then invokes a shared deallocator helper twice with specific arguments.

title: Zero-Init Destructor with Optional Cleanup Callback
one_line_summary: Zero-initializes an object and conditionally invokes an external cleanup function if a callback pointer is set.

title: IDNA Punycode Label Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes Punycode-encoded domain name labels with recursion limiting and error handling, returning success/failure status.

title: EH Support Detection
one_line_summary: Verifies exception handling support by checking for STATUS_ACCESS_DENIED (0xC000001D) and the presence of a MSR DAIFSet, #0 instruction, returning 1 only if both conditions are satisfied.

title: UTF-8 Encode and Write Helper
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit value as UTF-8 (1–4 bytes), writes it via a vtable function pointer, validates reference-counting constraints, invokes destructors on auxiliary data, and returns write success status.

title: Protocol Structure Validator
one_line_summary: Validates a structured input header by checking byte constraints, computing a bounds-checked offset, and verifying trailing content terminators, returning 1 for success, 0 for failure, or crashing on critical errors.

title: Buffer Append with Capacity Check
one_line_summary: Attempts to append X2 bytes from X1 into a managed buffer structure at X0, using memcpy if space allows, otherwise invoking growth/error logic and null-terminating/failing.

title: Safe memcpy with Metadata and Callback Hooks
one_line_summary: Performs a conditional memory copy with alignment checks, metadata-driven callback invocation, and post-copy validation via destructor-like hooks.

title: Bytecode/DSL Parser with Recursion Guard
one_line_summary: Parses a custom bytecode or text-based DSL by dispatching on input bytes, handling keywords, type operators, and recursion-sensitive constructs, returning success/failure status.

title: Packed Buffer Size Computation
one_line_summary: Computes and validates the required size for a 16-byte-aligned packed buffer, with special handling for '#'-prefixed entries and debug assertions for invalid configurations.

title: Conditional UTF-8-like Codepoint Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit codepoint from *x0 into a variable-length UTF-8-like byte sequence (1–4 bytes) based on the flag *(x1+3) & 0x18, then passes the encoded bytes and length to sub_140011FA4.

title: RwLock Read-Lock with Exponential Backoff and WaitOnAddress
one_line_summary: Acquires a read lock on a shared RwLock using atomic retries, explicit backoff loops with ISB, and OS-assisted waiting via WaitOnAddress under contention.

title: AVX-512 Vector Arithmetic Dispatcher with Fallback and Retry Logic
one_line_summary: Dispatches optimized AVX-512 vector operations based on control word flags, handles variable-length data parsing, performs reduction and conditional arithmetic, and uses vtable-based retry mechanisms for robustness.

title: Structured Integer Literal Parser
one_line_summary: Parses signed integer literals (i8–i128) from strings/values into a typed output structure, performing syntax validation, range checks, and diagnostic error reporting.

title: Bounded Byte Scanner with In-Place State Update
one_line_summary: Scans for a specific byte within a bounded region of a custom buffer structure, updates internal cursor/length state in-place, and handles errors with debug breaks or early returns.

title: Exception Cleanup & Unwind Handler
one_line_summary: Safely unwinds stack and cleans up exception resources by validating pointers, invoking destructors, and deallocating exception data—likely a __cxa_end_catch or personality helper.

title: Tag-Guarded Method Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Checks a tag at offset +8 of *X0; if 1, sets up stack and calls handler sub_14000D3F8, else jumps to fallback handler sub_14000A190.

title: Variable-Length UTF-8 Encoder for 32-bit Integers
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit integer into a variable-length UTF-8-like sequence (1–4 bytes), writes it to a growable buffer, and flushes/resizes the buffer if needed.

title: Base-N Numeric Prefix Parser with Underscore Support
one_line_summary: Parses a numeric prefix (base 10/16/36, digits 0-9, a-f, underscore separators) from a string, returning parsed length and end pointer, while enforcing trailing uppercase letter validation and zeroing output on failure.

title: Conditional Struct Equality Comparator
one_line_summary: Returns 1 if two variable-length structures are equal under a custom scheme: normalizes and compares the first byte (subtracts 5, clamps to ≥0); non-matching normalized values return 0; matching non-zero normalized values return 1 immediately; only for normalized zero (original byte = 5) does it perform deep comparisons of pointer fields at offsets +8, +0x10, +0x18, +0x20 via memcmp or pointer equality.
